import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Home.css'; import { FadeTransition } from './PageTransition'; import profileImage from '../assets/hrishith.jpeg'; // Update this with your actual image filename const Home = () => { return (

Hi, I'm
Hrishith Raj Reddy Malgireddy

Full Stack Developer
Cyber Security Enthusiast
AI/ML Developer

I create beautiful and functional web applications that help businesses grow and succeed.

View My Work Contact Me
); }; export default Home;
